"vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:P/VC:N/VI:L/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-116", "name": "Improper Encoding or Escaping of Output"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-150", "name": "Improper Neutralization of Escape, Meta, or Control Sequences"}], "description": "## Summary

ACP CLI approval prompt ANSI escape sequence injection

## Affected Packages / Versions

- Package: `openclaw`
- Affected versions: `>= 2026.2.13, <= 2026.3.24`
- First patched version: `2026.3.25`
- Latest published npm version at verification time: `2026.3.24`

## Details

ACP tool titles could previously carry ANSI control sequences into approval prompts and permission logs, letting untrusted tool metadata spoof terminal output. Commit `464e2c10a5edceb380d815adb6ff56e1a4c50f60` sanitizes tool titles at the source and broadens ANSI stripping to full CSI sequences.

Verified vulnerable on tag `v2026.3.24` and fixed on `main` by commit `464e2c10a5edceb380d815adb6ff56e1a4c50f60`.

## Fix Commit(s)

- `464e2c10a5edceb380d815adb6ff56e1a4c50f60`", "epss": {"percentage": 0.0026, "percentile": 0.17503}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-4hmj-39m8-jwc7", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-03-29T15:50:41Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-4hmj-39m8-jwc7", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-4hmj-39m8-jwc7"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-35651"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-04-10T17:17:05Z", "published_at": "2026-03-29T15:50:41Z", "references": ["https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/security/advisories/GHSA-4hmj-39m8-jwc7", "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/464e2c10a5edceb380d815adb6ff56e1a4c50f60", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-35651", "https://www.vulncheck.com/advisories/openclaw-ansi-escape-sequence-injection-in-approval-prompt", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-4hmj-39m8-jwc7"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/openclaw/openclaw/security-advisories/GHSA-4hmj-39m8-jwc7", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw", "summary": "OpenClaw has ACP CLI approval prompt ANSI escape sequence injection", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-04-24T19:53:47Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-4hmj-39m8-jwc7", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2026.3.28", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "openclaw"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 2026.2.13, <= 2026.3.24"}], "withdrawn_at": null}
